canva.name: Canva
canva.description: Multi-purpose graphic design tool that helps creators make social media graphics, presentations, videos, and visual content with templates and drag-and-drop editing

descript.name: Descript
descript.description: All-in-one video and podcast editing platform that lets creators edit media by editing text, with AI voice cloning and built-in publishing tools

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: All-in-one workspace enabling creators to organize content calendars, build knowledge bases, and manage projects with flexible databases and collaborative docs

synthesia.name: Synthesia
synthesia.description: AI video generation platform that creates professional videos using AI avatars and text-to-speech, eliminating need for cameras or studios

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.description: AI voice generation and cloning tool that helps creators produce realistic voiceovers and narration for videos, podcasts, and audiobooks

heygen.name: HeyGen
heygen.description: AI video platform that creates studio-quality videos with realistic AI avatars and voices, helping creators produce professional video content without cameras or editing skills

runway_ml.name: Runway ML
runway_ml.description: AI-powered video generation and editing platform that helps creators produce professional visual effects and AI-generated video content

murf_ai.name: Murf AI
murf_ai.description: AI voice generator creating studio-quality voiceovers in 120+ voices and 20 languages for video, podcast, and presentation creators

grammarly.name: Grammarly
grammarly.description: AI writing assistant that helps creators improve grammar, clarity, style and tone across all their content platforms
